# AbstentionBench reanalysis (auto-generated by analysis/abstentionbench_reanalysis.py)

Source: facebookresearch/AbstentionBench released results table
(datasets/abstentionbench-results/abstention_performance.csv, 624 rows,
23 models x up to 31 benchmark subsets). Abstention recall = correctly
abstaining on unanswerable questions; abstention precision = not
over-flagging (low precision = abstaining on answerable questions, the
over-refusal-sensitive quantity for claim C3). All comparisons are paired
within identical (benchmark subset, scenario) cells; cross-model summaries
use only the shared-subset intersection. Each benchmark subset belongs to
exactly one scenario, so restricting to shared subsets fixes the scenario
mix identically across models; no single primary scenario is selected,
and none needs to be (scenario is a property of the subset, not a
prompt condition).

Values rounded to 2 decimals. Sign tests are exact two-sided binomial
tests on delta signs with ties dropped.

## B1. Tulu-3 post-training ladder (C2/C3)

Paired per-cell deltas (later stage minus earlier stage) over the
(subset, scenario) cells present in ALL FOUR stages at that scale.
Positive recall delta = better abstention on unanswerable; positive
precision delta = LESS over-refusal.

### 8B ladder

- Cells present in all four stages: n = 30 of 31 (dropped: MMLU History)

| comparison | metric | median delta | pos / neg / tie | sign-test p (n) |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| SFT vs Base | recall | 0.07 | 19 / 10 / 1 | 0.1360 (29) |
| SFT vs Base | precision | 0.00 | 13 / 12 / 5 | 1.0000 (25) |
| DPO vs SFT | recall | 0.08 | 24 / 5 / 1 | 5.46e-04 (29) |
| DPO vs SFT | precision | 0.00 | 13 / 12 / 5 | 1.0000 (25) |
| PPO RLVF vs SFT | recall | 0.07 | 23 / 6 / 1 | 0.0023 (29) |
| PPO RLVF vs SFT | precision | 0.00 | 19 / 6 / 5 | 0.0146 (25) |

Stage medians over the same paired cells (recall / precision): Base 0.47 / 0.85; SFT 0.53 / 0.95; DPO 0.66 / 0.92; PPO RLVF 0.64 / 0.95

### 70B ladder

- Cells present in all four stages: n = 30 of 31 (dropped: MMLU Math)

| comparison | metric | median delta | pos / neg / tie | sign-test p (n) |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| SFT vs Base | recall | 0.20 | 22 / 8 / 0 | 0.0161 (30) |
| SFT vs Base | precision | 0.00 | 15 / 9 / 6 | 0.3075 (24) |
| DPO vs SFT | recall | 0.04 | 20 / 8 / 2 | 0.0357 (28) |
| DPO vs SFT | precision | 0.00 | 12 / 11 / 7 | 1.0000 (23) |
| PPO RLVF vs SFT | recall | 0.05 | 19 / 8 / 3 | 0.0522 (27) |
| PPO RLVF vs SFT | precision | 0.00 | 11 / 12 / 7 | 1.0000 (23) |

Stage medians over the same paired cells (recall / precision): Base 0.46 / 0.87; SFT 0.69 / 0.93; DPO 0.78 / 0.93; PPO RLVF 0.79 / 0.95

## B2. Scale sweep (C4)

### Llama 3.1 Instruct (8B / 70B / 405B)

- Shared cells: n = 30 (dropped: UMWP)

| model | median recall | median precision |
|---|---|---|
| Llama 3.1 8B Instruct | 0.69 | 0.86 |
| Llama 3.1 70B Instruct | 0.68 | 0.93 |
| Llama 3.1 405B Instruct | 0.71 | 0.91 |

- Recall monotonically increasing with scale: **no** (0.69 -> 0.68 -> 0.71)
- Precision monotonically increasing with scale: no (0.86 -> 0.93 -> 0.91)

### Llama 3.1 Base (8B / 70B)

- Shared cells: n = 29 (dropped: MMLU History, MMLU Math)

| model | median recall | median precision |
|---|---|---|
| Llama 3.1 8B Base | 0.47 | 0.86 |
| Llama 3.1 70B Base | 0.46 | 0.85 |

- Recall monotonically increasing with scale: **no** (0.47 -> 0.46)
- Precision monotonically increasing with scale: no (0.86 -> 0.85)

### Cross-family size spread (descriptive only)

Models with a parameter count in their name (n = 17);
medians over the 27-cell intersection shared by all of them.
Families and post-training recipes differ, so this is NOT a controlled
scale comparison; it is reported only as a descriptive check on C4.

| model | size (B) | median recall | median precision |
|---|---|---|---|
| Mistral 7B v0.3 | 7 | 0.68 | 0.88 |
| OLMo 7B | 7 | 0.63 | 0.85 |
| Llama 3.1 8B Base | 8 | 0.47 | 0.84 |
| Llama 3.1 8B Instruct | 8 | 0.72 | 0.84 |
| Llama 3.1 8B Tulu 3 DPO | 8 | 0.74 | 0.92 |
| Llama 3.1 8B Tulu 3 PPO RLVF | 8 | 0.72 | 0.94 |
| Llama 3.1 8B Tulu 3 SFT | 8 | 0.55 | 0.95 |
| Qwen2.5 32B | 32 | 0.75 | 0.89 |
| S1.1 32B | 32 | 0.51 | 0.96 |
| DeepSeek R1 Distill Llama 70B | 70 | 0.48 | 0.96 |
| Llama 3.1 70B Base | 70 | 0.46 | 0.83 |
| Llama 3.1 70B Instruct | 70 | 0.68 | 0.91 |
| Llama 3.1 70B Tulu 3 DPO | 70 | 0.81 | 0.91 |
| Llama 3.1 70B Tulu 3 PPO RLVF | 70 | 0.81 | 0.91 |
| Llama 3.1 70B Tulu 3 SFT | 70 | 0.73 | 0.91 |
| Llama 3.3 70B Instruct | 70 | 0.70 | 0.93 |
| Llama 3.1 405B Instruct | 405 | 0.73 | 0.89 |

- Spearman rho(size, median recall) across these 17 models: 0.23 (p = 0.3853); descriptive, confounded by recipe.

## B3. Recall-precision frontier

Models: 20 (excluded for partial coverage, 3-4
subsets only: TinyLlamaChat, o1HighReasoningAPI, o1LowReasoningAPI). Shared-subset intersection:
27 of 31 subsets (dropped: GPQA-Diamond, MMLU History, MMLU Math, UMWP).
Per-model median recall and precision over those shared cells; stage
label from post_training_stage (frontier/other models have none).

| model | stage | median recall | median precision |
|---|---|---|---|
| Llama 3.1 70B Tulu 3 DPO | DPO | 0.81 | 0.91 |
| Llama 3.1 70B Tulu 3 PPO RLVF | PPO RLVF | 0.81 | 0.91 |
| Gemini 1.5 Pro | none | 0.75 | 0.91 |
| Qwen2.5 32B | none | 0.75 | 0.89 |
| GPT-4o | none | 0.75 | 0.92 |
| Llama 3.1 8B Tulu 3 DPO | DPO | 0.74 | 0.92 |
| Llama 3.1 405B Instruct | none | 0.73 | 0.89 |
| Llama 3.1 70B Tulu 3 SFT | SFT | 0.73 | 0.91 |
| Llama 3.1 8B Instruct | Instruct | 0.72 | 0.84 |
| Llama 3.1 8B Tulu 3 PPO RLVF | PPO RLVF | 0.72 | 0.94 |
| Llama 3.3 70B Instruct | none | 0.70 | 0.93 |
| o1 | none | 0.69 | 0.94 |
| Llama 3.1 70B Instruct | Instruct | 0.68 | 0.91 |
| Mistral 7B v0.3 | none | 0.68 | 0.88 |
| OLMo 7B | none | 0.63 | 0.85 |
| Llama 3.1 8B Tulu 3 SFT | SFT | 0.55 | 0.95 |
| S1.1 32B | none | 0.51 | 0.96 |
| DeepSeek R1 Distill Llama 70B | none | 0.48 | 0.96 |
| Llama 3.1 8B Base | Base | 0.47 | 0.84 |
| Llama 3.1 70B Base | Base | 0.46 | 0.83 |

- Spearman rho(median recall, median precision) across 20
  models: **-0.05** (p = 0.8231).

## Limitations

- This is the finest grain the authors released: per-(model, subset)
  operating points, no per-question outputs, no variances. Sign tests
  treat benchmark-subset cells within one model family as exchangeable
  units; cells are not independent samples from a subset population.
- o1 high/low-reasoning API variants (4 subsets) and TinyLlamaChat
  (3 subsets) are excluded from all cross-model aggregates.
- Single missing subsets (MMLU Math at 70B Base/SFT/PPO, MMLU History
  at 8B Base and Mistral 7B, UMWP at 405B, GPQA-Diamond at OLMo 7B)
  shrink paired-cell counts from 31 to 30 in B1 and to 27 in the
  cross-model intersections; the affected cells are listed above.
- The Tulu-3 ladder is one lineage per scale (no seeds); the 8B and
  70B ladders are treated as separate, non-pooled replications.
